claim: VERIFIED: All gathered evidence is sufficient to support PRD readiness; no assumptions presented as facts, all evidence paths are usable and specific, and missing data is properly empty.

evidence.summary: Boundary audit implementation: buildBoundarySnapshot() creates SHA256 digests, diffBoundarySnapshots() compares before/after, results directly affect PRD readiness via BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blockers
evidence.why: Core evidence proving the main acceptance criterion that boundary audit blocks PRD readiness on project mutation

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues() and projectEvidenceBlockingIssues() enforce evidence quality; inspectDemandPrdReadiness() blocks on missing/failed evidence agents
evidence.why: Evidence that insufficient evidence (missing data, blocked results) becomes PRD readiness blockers

evidence.summary: CLAUDE_BOUNDARY_TOOLS array includes comprehensive tool set (Read, Write, Edit, Bash, WebFetch, WebSearch, Agent)
evidence.why: Evidence that full-tool Claude agents are supported, not sandboxed

evidence.summary: buildProviderInvocation() passes full tool configuration to Claude including --tools and --allowedTools
evidence.why: Corroborating evidence that full-tool agents are used at runtime

evidence.summary: Tests prove boundary detection works for both tool availability and mutation blocking, including git-backed file tracking
evidence.why: Executable evidence validating that the boundary audit system actually works

evidence.summary: Doctrine explicitly states boundary audit and evidence quality enforcement as intentional product design
evidence.why: Product-level requirement confirming implementation is not accidental
Proves no assumptions were presented as facts by the explorer
Proves independent verification also introduced no assumptions

evidence.summary: Explorer evidence result has missing: [] (no unresolved missing data)
evidence.why: Shows all required facts were successfully gathered

evidence.summary: Cross-checker evidence result has missing: [] (independent verification complete)
evidence.why: Confirms no data gaps were identified during independent cross-check

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues() enforces that project-scoped evidence must have repo-relative paths and valid scopes
evidence.why: Evidence path usability is enforced by router-level validation

risks: If the verifier itself has incomplete access to previous agent results, verification could be incomplete
If evidence paths become stale (files moved/deleted after agent execution), verification could pass on now-invalid evidence

result.notes: Verification complete: All 17 evidence items from explorer and cross-checker are properly scoped with specific project paths and line numbers. No assumptions promoted to facts (both agents have empty assumptions arrays). No missing data unresolved (both agents have empty missing arrays). Evidence quality enforcement exists in router.ts (projectEvidenceBlockingIssues) and would block invalid claims. PRD readiness acceptance criteria are met: project paths are cited, boundary audit blocks on mutation (proven in evidence-dispatch.ts lines 564-583), and insufficient evidence blocks readiness (proven in router.ts lines 462-511).
